REIMAGINE

An invitation to the New Renaissance.
REIMAGINE is not for those waiting for things to return to normal.
It is for those ready to reimagine Human Capital.
A guided AI journey from the raw spark of an idea to your Unicorn Strategy Blueprint.
The threshold

Welcome to the REIMAGINE Workshop

Step inside an 8-stage AI-guided journey for turning the raw spark of an idea into your Unicorn Strategy Blueprint.

Across 8 stages and 27 guided reflections, your REIMAGINE AI guide will help you clarify your founder identity, uncover your hidden assets, shape your business concept, build your capital stack, and bring everything together into your Unicorn Strategy Blueprint.

You will move through the journey one reflection at a time, working alongside your own AI project.

Before You Begin

Create a dedicated AI project, chat, or thread called REIMAGINE Workshop.

Whenever the Unicorn 🦄 button appears, click it to copy the reflection prompt. Then paste the prompt into your REIMAGINE Workshop AI project.

After completing the reflection in your AI project, return here and continue the journey.

Your progress is saved in this browser.
Your REIMAGINE Journey

One continuous path, taken one reflection at a time.

Closing

An Invitation to the New Renaissance
Closing

An Invitation to the New Renaissance

This workshop is just the beginning.

If something in these reflections stirred a deeper question, you’re not alone.

REIMAGINE began as an exploration of what comes after the white-collar world: how high-level professionals could unlock their Founder’s DNA, recover their hidden assets, and design a more human-centered future of value creation.

From the first workshop, the Reimaginari began to come to life: a small but meaningful community of founders imagining physical, human-centered businesses rooted in purpose, creativity, and value. And even at that early stage, something rare happened: the right people began finding each other. Unexpected synergies. Shared visions. The kind of creative collisions that hint at future collaborations none of us could have planned.

While I remain deeply engaged in my investment research, I still carry the larger REIMAGINE vision: exclusive Reimagine Retreats, gatherings at the Reimagine Studio, perhaps one day the Reimagine Academy, and chapters of the Reimaginari in cities around the world.

And maybe, one day, we’ll all meet at the Reimagine Forum in Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, where Human Capital was first reimagined.

For now, it begins here, with your Unicorn Strategy Blueprint.
